dialogos.texto_en: Hm...hmmm...
Morning, Nino.
She's still sleeping?
(What time is it...?)
(Oh, it's still this early.\n When was the last time\n I woke up earlier than my alarm clock?)
(It's because I can't wait to go on a trip\n with Futaro-kun.)
(I really am like a little kid.)
(...Starting with this trip, I should\n make it a habit to wake up early.)
Alright, I'm ready now.
Nino! It's morning!\nIt's time to wake up.
Hm... Hmmm...
Huh?
Morning, Nino.
Ichika?\nIt's you, right?
Yeah, of course it's me.\nWhat's up? Are you still half asleep?
No way. I can't believe you woke up before me.\nI wonder if it'll rain today,\nor maybe it'll even snow.
Don't worry, it's going to be sunny all day today.
That's reassuring...\nBut, why did you wake up so early?
Oh, there's no deep meaning to it.\nIt just happened.
Anyway, stop talking, and hurry up and change.\nIf you take too long, the breakfast buffet might finish.
I can't believe the day YOU tell ME that has come...
Come on, I got it already!\nI'll make an effort to wake up by myself\nevery day!
That's what I want you to do.\nDon't keep relying on Yotsuba and me forever,\nyou know.
Okay.
